message:
chore(deps): migrate asupersync from pinned git rev to v0.2.0 crates.io

Replace git-sourced asupersync with pinned rev (22505d8) with
crates.io v0.2.0. Update patch section to use local path for
frankensearch's transitive asupersync dependency resolution.
